data_minimization.reasoning: The policy does not mention biometric data at all, so no data minimization principles are described for this category.

collected.policy_snippet: Food and Activity Diary Data may include sensitive personal information when the information indicates or allows someone to infer a health condition.
collected.purpose: The data is collected as part of the user's voluntary sharing of dietary habits and activities to support their health and fitness journey.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states they collect information 'to give you the best support' and lists broad categories like 'information related to any physiological conditions' and 'lifestyle information (e.g., sleeping data)' without providing concrete limits or justification for why each specific type of data is necessary.

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy (including to satisfy our legal or reporting requirements), unless a longer retention period is required or allowed under law.
stored.purpose: To fulfill the purposes outlined in the policy and to satisfy legal or reporting requirements.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: The right to request that we delete your personal information (subject to certain exceptions prescribed by applicable law).

shared.policy_snippet: We disclose personal information to the categories of recipients described below: ... Our Service Providers. We may disclose your personal information to third parties that provide business, professional, or technical support services to us and/or perform functions on our behalf to provide the Services.
shared.purpose: To provide the Services, including support functions like data storage, analytics, and customer support.

health_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Health data is collected, stored, and shared with service providers, including international transfers. While users have a right to request deletion, the policy lacks specific data minimization limits for health-related information collection.

collected.policy_snippet: Lifestyle information (e.g., sleeping data); Information related to any physiological conditions;
collected.purpose: To provide you with our Services, personalize content and features to your interests and goals, and enhance our Services.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states 'we collect personal information from you along the way' and lists a broad range of data categories including 'Information related to any physiological conditions' and 'Lifestyle information (e.g., sleeping data)' without providing concrete limits on what is collected or justification for why each specific type of data is necessary.

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy (including to satisfy our legal or reporting requirements), unless a longer retention period is required or allowed under law.
stored.purpose: To fulfill the purposes outlined in the policy, satisfy legal or reporting requirements.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: The right to request that we delete your personal information (subject to certain exceptions prescribed by applicable law).

shared.policy_snippet: We may disclose your personal information, including device and browser information and activity and usage information, to our marketing and advertising partners, including social media platforms, third-party advertising networks, and other parties that assist us in serving, measuring the performance of, and optimizing our advertising campaigns.
shared.purpose: For targeted advertising, cross-device tracking, and to analyze ad performance.

physiological_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physiological data such as sleeping data and information related to physiological conditions is collected, stored indefinitely based on necessity, and may be shared with marketing partners. This data is sensitive and its broad collection without clear minimization, coupled with international transfers to countries with differing privacy laws, poses significant privacy risks.

collected.policy_snippet: Body measurements (e.g., height, weight, and BMI)
collected.purpose: Body measurements are collected as part of Food and Activity Diary Data.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states collection of various physical data types (height, weight, BMI) but lacks a clear justification for necessity for each data point.

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy
stored.purpose: General retention for fulfilling policy purposes.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: Right to Deletion. The right to request that we delete your personal information

shared.policy_snippet: We may disclose your personal information to other MyFitnessPal users in the context of specific features that are social in nature as part of the Services.
shared.purpose: Sharing in context of social features.

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physical data (body measurements) is collected, retained indefinitely, and may be shared internationally and with other users, raising risks of unauthorized disclosure and profiling.

collected.policy_snippet: MyFitnessPal may collect Usage and Device Data. This may include details about your browser, operating system, or device (such as your cookie identifiers, internet protocol (IP) address, ​​mobile advertising identifier, and other unique identifiers), internet service provider, mobile carrier, general location information (including inferred location based off of your IP address), actions that you take while using the Services, information about how you interact with the Services, including the frequency and duration of your activities, information about the links you click, and other information about how you use the Services.
collected.purpose: The policy explicitly states collection of actions taken while using the Services, interaction details, frequency and duration of activities, clicked links, and other usage information.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states 'we collect personal information from you along the way' and describes broad categories of information collected. While it mentions collecting information 'to give you the best support', it lacks specific, concrete limits justifying why each type of behavioral data is necessary. Claims about necessity are generic.

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy (including to satisfy our legal or reporting requirements), unless a longer retention period is required or allowed under law.
stored.purpose: The policy explicitly states retention of personal information, which includes behavioral data, for as long as necessary to fulfill outlined purposes and legal requirements.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: Right to Deletion. The right to request that we delete your personal information (subject to certain exceptions prescribed by applicable law).

shared.policy_snippet: We may disclose your personal information, including device and browser information and activity and usage information, to our marketing and advertising partners, including social media platforms, third-party advertising networks, and other parties that assist us in serving, measuring the performance of, and optimizing our advertising campaigns.
shared.purpose: The policy explicitly states disclosure of activity and usage information to marketing and advertising partners for serving, measuring, and optimizing advertising campaigns.

behavioral_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Behavioral data is explicitly collected and stored, with retention based on vague necessity criteria. It is shared with marketing partners for targeted advertising, and transfers occur internationally to countries with differing data protection laws.
